text:
I've updated the code to try 4 different methods to fetch the approvals:

1. **Direct API call** (in case CORS is allowed)
2. **allorigins.win proxy**
3. **cors-anywhere.herokuapp.com**
4. **corsproxy.io**

It will try each one until one succeeds. The console will show which method worked.

Now try it again and check the browser console. It will show:
- Which methods it's trying
- Which one succeeded (if any)
- The actual error if all fail

Please share what you see in the console so I can fix the exact issue. The console logs will tell us exactly what's blocking the API calls.
